characters.name: Abel
characters.description: AbelAbel in Bree Garland's bodyBiographical InformationAlias(es)Infernal Guinea PigBree Garland(while in her body)SpeciesHumanStatusDeceasedManner of DeathA few millennia ago(killed byCain)2018(hit by an ambulance)GenderMale(briefly in a female body)AffiliationsHomeHell(formerly)Earth(formerly)HeavenRelativesAdam(father)Eve(mother)Mazikeen(stepmother)Cain†(brother)OccupationShepherdOther AffiliationsBree Garland(vessel)AppearancesPortrayed byLauren LapkusSeasonsThreeEpisode"Infernal Guinea Pig" Abelwas Eve's son and the brother ofCainas well as the world's first murder victim. Abel was Adam and Eve's second son, his elder brother was Cain. He worked as a shepherd, and had a large flock of sheep, "Do you know how many sheep I possess? Enough for two wives. Enough to feed our offspring and our offspring's offspring."  He was apparently his mother's favorite, asEvereferred to him as her sweet and gentle Abel, when everyone else held a differing view of him. According to Cain, Abel is an "asshat" who is not innocent, after all, after dying he ended up in Hell. Cain says, "Abel wanted to kill me just as much as I wanted to kill him. Why do you think he's in Hell?" Abel's Hell loop seems to confirm Cain's belief. His mother Eve, however, states that Abel was sweet and gentle. Maze calls Abel a "total poon hound", i.e., a womanizer, adding, "He always runs to food or boobs. Usually boobs." He enjoys a good party and is constantly trying to sleep with women. He comes off as a jerk using pick-up lines like, "Let's be fruitful, and multiply. Allow me to bless you with my seed." Maze also described his personality as "caveman Lucifer" suggesting heightened carnal appetites but without any of the charm or class. Abel has an intense fear of Cain and calls him his torturer, "Every time I seek out revelry, my brother arrives.  He kills me. Over and over. And there's nothing I can do to avoid it. I've tried everything. Fighting him, running from him, all in vain. I'm trapped. I can never escape." Due to his hell loop changing so much, Abel is slow to notice drastic changes, such as the fact he was in a woman's body, despite the obvious difference in anatomy; "Are those bosoms mine? So that's why none of those menfolk heard a word I said."

characters.name: Adam
characters.description: AdamBiographical InformationAlias(es)The First ManFirst Pancake(byMaze)Barrel of Laughs(byLucifer)Fig Leaf(byLucifer)The World's Number One Cuckold(by himself)SpeciesHumanStatusAliveDate of BirthAfter CreationAgeMillions of Years Old (Older than Cain)GenderMaleAffiliationsHomeGarden of EdenHeaven(formerly)Los Angeles, CA, United States,Earth-666RelativesGod(Creator)Lilith†(first wife, ex-wife)Eve(second wife, ex-wife)Cain†(son)Abel†(son)AppearancesPortrayed byScott MacArthurSeasonsSixEpisode"My Best Fiend's Wedding"Adamis the first male human created byGod. He was the husband ofEve, the father ofCainandAbel, and the progenitor of humanity. Adam was created alongside his first wifeLilithin the Garden of Eden. However, after they separated, God used one of Adam’s ribs to create his new mate Eve. Throughout their millennia of marriage, Adam still longed for Lilith and never really loved Eve, who tried to change herself into the woman Adam wanted her to be but was never enough for him. Eve did sire him two sons namedCainandAbel. When Adam and Eve died on Earth, they became the first human residents of theSilver City. According to Eve, Adam lounges around Heaven for the most part. Even Lucifer sarcastically calls him "a barrel of laughs". Since Heaven got ESPN, Adam has been watching avidly. When he reappears on Earth, Adam shows he is the poster child of toxic masculinity. He makes Lucifer's past self-absorption look minor in comparison; he thinks everything is about him even when flatly told it's not. Adam later admits that he was confused about what to do as God gave him a defined role; being in Heaven didn't help. Turns out he didn't even notice Eve left Heaven for over a year and thought her wedding with Maze was a cry for help. Adam did try making progress with evolving, but found he was contradicting himself.

characters.personality_section: Amenadiel is very head-strong, loyal, determined, disciplined, honorable, and righteous.Luciferonce described him as a "major power-hungry dick", though he admitted that he and their other siblings all looked up to Amenadiel. He is extremely loyal to his Father,God, and has shown great determination to complete whatever task he believes God wants him to do. While not initially evident, it becomes clear that Amenadiel is jealous of Lucifer’s place as God’s ‘favorite’ son (Samael, which is translated as ‘God’s favorite’). He is thrilled when, having read in an untitled ancient tome that the key to Azrael’s blade, the missing third piece was given to God’s favorite son, and assuming that the piece was in Lucifer’s possession, he realizes that it was given to him - in the form of a necklace he always wears. Like his brother Lucifer, Amenadiel is physically handsome, well built, and has a powerful physique. Amenadiel initially shows disdain towardsHelland Earth. He rejects becoming thesovereign of Hellnor does he want to live on Earth. He looks down at humans and once called humans who were with Lucifer "poor creatures" who "know not what they do." However, after living on Earth he begins to understand humans more and even falls in love with one. While generally trying to do "good", Amenadiel has at times deviated. While trying to force Lucifer to go back to Hell, he lied to and manipulated Dr.Linda Martin. He also resurrectedMalcolm Grahamfrom Hell for Malcolm to kill Lucifer. Go

characters.description: AtillaBiographical InformationAlias(es)Atilla the HunSpeciesHumanStatusDeceasedDate of Birth406Manner of DeathMarch 453Age46-47GenderMaleAffiliationsHomePannonia, Roman Empire,Earth-666(formerly)OccupationKing of the Huns(formerly)AppearancesAttila, frequently calledAttila the Hun, was the ruler of the Huns and the leader of a tribal empire consisting of Huns, Ostrogoths, Alans and Bulgars, among others, in Central and Eastern Europe. He is considered one of the most powerful rulers in world history, ruling the Huns from 434 up to his death in 453. characters.name: Axara
characters.description: AxaraBiographical InformationSpeciesHumanStatusAliveGenderFemaleAffiliationsHomeLos Angeles, CA, United StatesRelativesRohan Donahue (manager)Bob (bodyguard)Cece (personal assistant)Patrick (ex-backup singer)AppearancesPortrayed bySkye TownsendSeasonsThreeEpisodeLet Pinhead Sing!= Axarais a pop singer, appearing in the season 3 episode, "Let Pinhead Sing!"  When her backup singer is killed, it appears someone is targeting the singer, herself.Lucifer Morningstarvolunteers her protection. While rehearsing for a concert to be given in LA, Axara alters the choreography so that her backup singer, Jill, takes the lead in a sequence.  When Jill is then shot with a firework and killed, homicide investigations led byChloe Deckerbring her in contact with Lucifer Morningstar.Ella Lopezmakes clear the death was no accident, "Fireworks weren't even part of Axara's show, let alone pointed right at the spotlight." Axara is a diva, demanding, arrogant, and self absorbed, but she also has some insight into human nature.

characters.description: AzraelHumanAngelBiographical InformationAlias(es)Angelof DeathMessenger ofGod(Collectively With OtherAngels)Children(along withAngelsbyGodandGoddess)Sister(byAngels)Ray-Ray(byLucifer MorningstarandElla Lopez)Sisi(byLucifer Morningstar)Chick(byLinda Martin)GhostGuardianAngelSpeciesAngelStatusAliveDate of BirthBefore the creation of the UniverseAge13.8 Billion Years OldGenderFemaleAffiliationsHomeSilver City,Heaven,Universe,MultiverseRelativesGod(Father)Goddess(Mother)Angels(Siblings)Amenadiel(Eldest Brother)Michael(Older Brother)Lucifer Morningstar(Older Brother)Gabriel(Older Sister)Raphael(Older Brother)Uriel†(Older Brother)Zadkiel(Older Brother)Remiel†(Sister)Castiel(Brother)Hanjobadiel(Brother)Jophiel(Brother)Saraqael(Sister)Ibriel(Brother)Raziel(Sister)Lezmegadiel(Brother)Charlie Martin(Nephew)Aurora Morningstar(Niece)OccupationMember of the Heavenly HostReaper of soulsOther AffiliationsElla Lopez(Best Friend)AppearancesPortrayed byLo Mutuc (credited as Charlyne Yi)SeasonsThree,FiveFirst appearance"Boo Normal"Last appearance"A Chance at a Happy Ending" Azraelis anAngeland one ofLucifer Morningstar's younger siblings. She served as the Angel of Death and was responsible for collectinghumansouls from the dead, to bring them to eitherHeavenorHell. She was granted her ownunique bladethateradicatedanyone killed with it. She was very close to Lucifer, but after he was banished to Hell, she never visited, feeling it would be awkward. After meetingElla Lopez, on what was a false alarm, she grew fond of her, lying to her, saying that she was aGhost, eventually manipulating events to have her move toLos Angelesso that she and Lucifer could be friends. A year later, she discovered that Ella planned on moving back to Detroit and managed to talk her out of it, and being more open with her friends about her issues. characters.name: Jimmy Barnes
characters.actor_name: Andersen Bloomberg (child), James Immekus (young), and John Pankow (old)
characters.description: Jimmy BarnesChildYoungOldBiographical InformationAlias(es)Jimbo(byLucifer Morningstar)SpeciesHumanStatusDeceasedManner of Death2020GenderMaleAffiliationsHomeLos Angeles,Earth(formerly)Hell(currently)RelativesUnnamed MotherDelilah†(ex-fiancée)Unnamed ex-bridgeOccupationRecord ProducerOther AffiliationsLucifer(formerly)Unnamed young singer(ex-girlfriend)AppearancesPortrayed byAndersen Bloomberg (child), James Immekus (young), and John Pankow (old)SeasonsOne,SixEpisode"Yabba Dabba Do Me"First appearance"Pilot"Last appearance"Yabba Dabba Do Me"Jimmy Barneswas a minor antagonist who appears inseason oneandseason six. Two episodes in season one - "Pilot", and "Lucifer, Stay. Good Devil.", and one episode in season six - "Yabba Dabba Do Me". He was a record producer and eventually ended up inHellafter his death. Hell(currently) Jimmy grew up with a troubled childhood, with an absent father figure and a mother who would go on to abandon him in a motel room by himself. Jimmy is introduced as a selfish and arrogant man with little concern for others and a great concern for image. He considers himself solely responsible for the success of his clients and believes them to be indebted to him, that any success they achieved was due to his efforts, not theirs. Jimmy's root causes to his personality are revealed in third episode ofseason six- "Yabba Dabba Do Me". Jimmy's selfish personality would turn out to stem from trust issues. He believes others only value him if he has something to offer them. This belief is formed by a combination of his mother abandoning him as a child, of Wednesday's Child abandoning him as their manager, andDelilahabandoning him as her groom. When his mother abandoned him in a motel room as a child, he dealt with his mother's absence by submerging himself in cartoons. They are his source of comfort and how he deals with stress and fear, which is also why his the first layer of hisHell Loopis an animated cartoon ofLuciferruining his second marriage, a symptom of a much larger problem which developed in him since his youth.

characters.name: Roberta Beliard
characters.description: Roberta BeliardBiographical InformationAlias(es)Bobby B.SpeciesHumanStatusAliveGenderFemaleAffiliationsHomeLos AngelesOccupationSet nurseDrug dealerAppearancesPortrayed byRusty SchwimmmerSeasonsTwoEpisode"Everything's Coming Up Lucifer"Roberta Beliardis the villain of theseason 2 premiereofLucifer. Not much is known about Roberta's past, other than she works as a set nurse and drug dealer. Her best customer was an actress named Amy Dodd. However, Dodd stopped buying drugs from her after her sober companion, Gillian Taylor, helped her get clean. Enraged by this, Roberta strangled Taylor. Dodd had another dealer who put devil emojis on his packages, so Roberta stabbed two metal bars in Taylor's head in order to frame him. Taylor's body is found and the homicide is investigated byChloe DeckerandLucifer Morningstar. Roberta briefly speaks with them, saying that she got Taylor her job. Lucifer eventually learns from Dodd's boyfriend that her other dealer goes by the name Bobby B., who Lucifer figures out is Roberta. At the same time, Chloe learns that the rods came from a garden, and she also figures out Roberta is the killer. Lucifer goes to her house alone and confronts her. Roberta grabs a fire poker and threatens Lucifer. Thinking she couldn't hurt him, Lucifer lets his guard down and Roberta strikes him over the head. Chloe had just arrived at the house, so Lucifer had lost his immortality. Roberta hits Lucifer again and begins strangling him, while ranting about what Taylor did. Hearing the commotion, Chloe enters the house. Roberta then lets Lucifer go and attempts to bludgeon him with the fire poker, but Chloe tasers her from behind, incapacitating her. Roberta is last seen handcuffed and being led into a police car.

characters.description: Belios of the LilimBiographical InformationSpeciesDemonStatusAliveGenderMaleAffiliationsHomeHell,Universe,MultiverseRelativesLilith†(Mother)Lilim(Siblings)Mazikeen(Sister)Dromos(Brother)Squee(Brother)Gromos(Brother)OccupationLucifer Morningstar's ServantSoul TorturerLee Garner's TorturerDaniel Espinoza's GuardianDemon(formerly)Other AffiliationsLucifer Morningstar(King)Lee Garner's†(TorturedHuman)Daniel Espinoza's†(GuardedHuman)AppearancesPortrayed byEddie Blackwell ("Nothing Ever Changes Around Here")SeasonsFive,SixFirst appearance"Really Sad Devil Guy"Last appearance"Nothing Ever Changes Around Here"Belios of the Lilimis aDemonfromHell. He is one of the servants ofLucifer Morningstar, and was one of those assigned to torture the soul ofLee Garner. Belios is one of the manyDemonsoccupied inHell, he is one of the many children ofLilith, collectively called the Lilim. They were sent toLucifer Morningstarby their mother to act as his army, something the Lord of Hell was unaware he even needed, but was grateful for. WhenLee Garnerwas eventually murdered, his soul went Hell, and Belios was theDemonwho acted as his masked killer, for the first several hundred cycles of Lee's Hell Loop. When Lucifer paid a call on Lee, he decided to take a personal interest and gave Belios the day off. Belios appeas fairly laid back and charming, happy to play gunman in Lee's loop, or ping pong novice in Dan's. He obeys Lucifer's orders, regardless.

characters.name: Benny
characters.description: BennyBiographical InformationAlias(es)Fella(byJack Monroe)Rat(by Jack)SpeciesHumanStatusAliveGenderMaleAffiliationsHomeNew York City, NY United States,Earth-666OccupationCriminalOther AffiliationsTommy Stompanato†(boss)AppearancesPortrayed byChristopher GerseSeasonsFiveEpisode"It Never Ends Well for the Chicken"Bennywas a snitch that lived inNew York City, while also assisting the crime bossTommy Stompanatowhen he needed his services to lureLucifer MorningstarandJack Monroeout into an alley way to get ambushed by his thugs. Benny was hired byPaddyandVincenzoto getLucifer MorningstarandJack Monroeout back of theGarden Clubto be ruffed up by them per Tommy Stompanato's orders when they started asking too many questions. Benny sat at one of the clubs' tables and purposely got Jack's attention by making it seem like he wanted to "squeal," but was afraid to. As planned, he was approached by the PI, who then sat across from him. When asked if he had any information on "Lucky Larry", Benny confirmed he'd seen the eyepatch man around, but acted scared that they were being watched. He told him that didn't want to get in trouble, but would get him the "skinny" if they met him outside the club in five minutes. He then left the table in a rush.

characters.name: Burt
characters.description: BurtBiographical InformationSpeciesHumanStatusAliveGenderMaleAffiliationsHomeLos AngelesOccupationDrug smugglerAppearancesPortrayed byJoe WilliamsonSeasonsTwoFirst appearance"Stewardess Interruptus"Last appearance"A Good Day to Die"Burtis a minor villain that appeared in thesecond seasonofLucifer. Little is revealed about Burt, other than he smuggles drugs between countries by using flight staff as drug mules. He was hired byJason Carlisleto smuggle poisons inside the country. He used a flight attendant named Jana Lawrence to smuggle the package, but it went missing on the flight. Burt assumed that Jana stole it. Burt goes to get the package from Jana, but when he learns that she doesn't have it he kills her. The murder causesChloe DeckerandLucifer Morningstarto investigate. He then goes after Raj Daniere, another flight attendant, who also didn't steal the package, so he kills him as well. Chloe and Lucifer learn about Burt and the drug smuggling from Tim Pickman, the pilot of the flight. The police form a plan to lure out Burt by havingMazikeen Smithpose as the third flight attendent on the plane and claim to have the package. However, Burt catches on to this and sends a decoy to the bar where the meeting would take place. Meanwhile Burt goes to the Bar's parking garage and holds Lucifer at gunpoint, believing that Jana left the package with him. Lucifer shows disgust at Burt's actions, since he offered Jana anything she wanted and then killed her. Lucifer then grabs Burt's gun away, leaving him unarmed. Burt then sees Lucifer's true face. The police then come and arrest him, and Burt begs them to get him away from Lucifer. Carlisle later recovers the poisons, which were actually stolen by Andy Kleinberg, the co-pilot of the flight.

characters.description: Gaius Caesar Augustus GermanicusBiographical InformationAlias(es)CaligulaSpeciesHumanStatusDeceasedDate of BirthAugust 31, AD 12Manner of DeathJanuary 24, AD 41Age28GenderMaleAffiliationsHomeAntium, Italy,Earth-666(formerly)OccupationEmperor of RomeAppearancesGaius Caesar Augustus Germanicus, better known by his childhood nickname,Caligula, was the third emperor of Rome from 37 to his death in 41. Roman emperor from 37 to 41,  succeeding his uncle,  Tiberius. After his accession Caligula rapidly squandered the vast amount Tiberius had accumulated in the state treasury. He plundered Gaul, then marched his troops to the northern shore of Gaul as a prelude to the invasion of Britain, but then ordered them to collect seashells which he called the spoils of the conquered ocean. Four months after his return from Gaul, Caligula was murdered at the Palatine Games by the tribune of the Praetorian guard, and others. After becoming Rome's third emperor, Caligula metLucifer Morningstarand engaged in a "human train" orgy with 37 other people. .[1]

characters.name: Jason Carlisle
characters.description: Jason CarlisleBiographical InformationAlias(es)Professor CarlisleSpeciesHumanStatusDeceasedManner of Death2017(suicide)GenderMaleAffiliationsHomeLos Angeles(former)Hell(current)RelativesUnnamed ex-wifeUnnamed childOccupationUniversity professorAppearancesPortrayed byTim DeKaySeasonsTwoFirst appearance"Stewardess Interruptus"Last appearance"A Good Day to Die" Professor Jason Carlisleis the secondary antagonist of Season 2 inLucifer, serving as the overarching antagonist of "Stewardess Interuptus,"as the main antagonist of "Love Handles,"the posthumous main antagonist of"A Good Day to Die,"and as the posthumous overarching impetus of both"Candy Morningstar" and "Deceptive Little Parasite." Carlisle was a college professor who lost his career and family because of choices he made in a life threatening situation; he saved his dissertation from a fiery car wreck, rather than aid the trapped driver, a college student, who then died. He would later conduct his own twisted experiment to prove he was not a monster; poisoning college students and to send them the antidote only if a successful person disfiguring the part of their body that made their career. He was tracked down byLucifer MorningstarandChloe Decker, but then committed suicide to avoid arrest.

characters.name: Benny Choi
characters.description: Benny ChoiBiographical InformationSpeciesHumanStatusAliveGenderMaleAffiliationsOccupationFashion designerAppearancesPortrayed byEddie ShinSeasonsOne,TwoFirst appearance"Sweet Kicks"Last appearance"Somebody's Been Reading Dante's Inferno"Benny Choiappears in the fifth episode ofseason one, "Sweet Kicks". He was a shoe designer until he gets arrested for orchestrating a shooting at his fashion show. As a youth, he was involved in the Asian Boyz street gang. After an incident, he approachedLucifer Morningstarfor a favor,Luciferagreed to grant one, kept him out of jail for breaking and entering, and set him on track for his first show, while his friendYellow Vipertook the fall instead. WhenViperwas released, Benny attempted to frame him by having his assistantHectorshoot up his own show. WhileHectordeliberately avoided shooting anyone, there was still a death, a girl namedPaula Cortezwas trampled to death in the ensuing panic. Luciferarranged for Benny to meetChloeand called in his favor, telling Benny to cooperate with her and answer all her questions in regard to the investigation into the shooting. Benny did so, and would later callChloeto report that his pet pig had been murdered. When he was toldYellow Viperhad been released from prison, "I sent him letters when he was inside San Quentin. Money for lawyers, too, but he sent the letters back all torn up, didn't take a dime. I always felt bad for how things turned out, how I got lucky.Viperwent down, he was my best friend."Lucifersuggested with friends like that best hide the knives.

characters.name: Corazon
characters.description: Mike CareyBiographical InformationAlias(es)CorazonSpeciesHumanStatusDeceasedManner of Death2016(murdered)GenderMaleAffiliationsOccupationSatanistAppearancesPortrayed byRyan BruceSeasonsOneEpisode"#TeamLucifer"Mike Carey, also known asCorazon, was a member of the Satanist congregation of theChurch of the Dark Prince,  the high priest of which said took things way too seriously. He was killed byMalcolm Graham. Corazon was a member of the Church of the Dark Prince, and whenRose Davisstarted dating him, she converted to satanism as well. Mitch WatsonakaOnyx, the high priest, toldChloe Deckerthat Carey took things too seriously and fancied doing real sacrifices with live animals. It is possible that he performed such sacrifices, as bloody chicken parts were found in Rose's "secret creepy room" which Corazon had access to.Lucifer, however, said if such a sacrifice was for him, he declined on the grounds of salmonella. When Rose was found murdered in an apparent satanic ritual, Corazon was seen as the prime suspect. Onyx was  more than willing to provide the police with his application information in an effort to discover his real name and address. Corazon, however, was later found murdered as well. He had been hung in the rafters of a warehouse with a pentagram carved in his chest.   When Detective Graham asked Lucifer what he thought of the case, Lucifer pensively said that it had been a long time since he had seen true evil.
